basic_details.job_title: KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Senior Scientists, Programme Assistant and More
basic_details.post_name: Senior Scientists, Programme Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Krishi Vigyan Kendra Tirunelveli (KVK Tirunelveli) Senior Scientists, Programme Assistant and More Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of KVK Tirunelveli. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the KVK Tirunelveli Senior Scientists, Programme Assistant and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral degree in relevant subject with 8 years experience, Master's Degree in Horticulture, Master's Degree in Veterinary Science, Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture
qualification.details: Senior Scientists / Head KVK: Doctoral degree in relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with 8 years experience in the relevant subject as Scientist/Lecturer/Extension Specialist or in an equivalent position in the pay band-3 of Rs.15600-39100 with Grade pay of Rs.5400/Rs. 6000/Rs. 7000/Rs. 8000 having made contribution to research/teaching/extension education as evidenced by published work/innovations and impact. Subject Matter Specialist (Horticulture): Master's Degree in the Horticulture or equivalent qualification from a recognized University. Subject Matter Specialist (Animal Science): Master's Degree in Veterinary science or equivalent qualification from a recognized University. Programme Assistant (Lab technician): Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture or equivalent qualification from a recognized University.

salary_details.pay_scale: PB 4, Rs.37400-67000 (GP Rs.9000) Level 13 A as per 7th CPC, PB 3, Rs.15600-39100 (GP Rs.5400) Level 10 as per 7th CPC, PB 2, Rs.9300-34800 (GP Rs.4200) Level 6 as per 7th CPC
salary_details.details: Senior Scientists / Head KVK: PB 4, Rs.37400-67000 (GP Rs.9000) Level 13 A as per 7th CPC Subject Matter Specialist (Horticulture): PB 3, Rs.15600-39100 (GP Rs.5400) Level 10 as per 7th CPC Subject Matter Specialist (Animal Science): PB 3, Rs.15600-39100 (GP Rs.5400) Level 10 as per 7th CPC Programme Assistant (Lab technician): PB 2, Rs.9300-34800 (GP Rs.4200) Level 6 as per 7th CPC

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KVK Tirunelveli Senior Scientists, Programme Assistant and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download KVK Tirunelveli Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: KVK Tirunelveli Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download KVK Tirunelveli Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Scientists / Head KVK: Doctoral degree in relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with 8 years experience in the relevant subject as Scientist/Lecturer/Extension Specialist or in an equivalent position in the pay band-3 of Rs.15600-39100 with Grade pay of Rs.5400/Rs. 6000/Rs. 7000/Rs. 8000 having made contribution to research/teaching/extension education as evidenced by published work/innovations and impact. Subject Matter Specialist (Horticulture): Master's Degree in the Horticulture or equivalent qualification from a recognized University. Subject Matter Specialist (Animal Science): Master's Degree in Veterinary science or equivalent qualification from a recognized University. Programme Assistant (Lab technician): Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture or equivalent qualification from a recognized University.

content_sections.heading: KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC.

content_sections.heading: KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Senior Scientists / Head KVK: PB 4, Rs.37400-67000 (GP Rs.9000) Level 13 A as per 7th CPC Subject Matter Specialist (Horticulture): PB 3, Rs.15600-39100 (GP Rs.5400) Level 10 as per 7th CPC Subject Matter Specialist (Animal Science): PB 3, Rs.15600-39100 (GP Rs.5400) Level 10 as per 7th CPC Programme Assistant (Lab technician): PB 2, Rs.9300-34800 (GP Rs.4200) Level 6 as per 7th CPC

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for KVK Tirunelveli Senior Scientists, Programme Assistant and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the KVK Tirunelveli Various Posts is 12th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for various posts under the KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026. These include Senior Scientists/Head KVK, Subject Matter Specialist (Horticulture), Subject Matter Specialist (Animal Science), and Programme Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Programme Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Programme Assistant (Lab technician) post, candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture or an equivalent qualification from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Senior Scientists / Head KVK post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Scientists / Head KVK post will be in Pay Band 4, ranging from Rs.37400-67000 with a Grade Pay of Rs.9000, Level 13 A as per the 7th CPC recommendations.

faq.question: Q7. Does KVK Tirunelveli offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, KVK Tirunelveli offers age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates from SC/ST communities can avail of a 5-year age relaxation, while OBC candidates can get a 3-year relaxation.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will be shortlisted for the interview round.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the official notification for KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is advisable to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the offline application for KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the offline application is detailed within the official notification. Candidates are advised to refer to the notification PDF for the complete postal address and submission instructions.
